bead.title: C0: pre-refactor JSONL fixture baseline for event-shape regression detection
bead.description:
Foundation bead for the execute-bead refactor. Captures canonical JSONL streams for a handful of bead lifecycles BEFORE any refactor child lands. Subsequent children diff their output against this baseline to catch event-shape regressions (R4 from /tmp/execute-bead-refactor-proposal.md §6.1).

Required fixtures (one canonical bead per lifecycle):
- merged success → close
- success → review APPROVE → close
- success → review BLOCK → reopen → triage
- land_conflict → recover → close
- no_changes_verified → already_satisfied close
- no_changes_unjustified → reopen with cooldown
- decomposition (declined_needs_decomposition)
- push_failed
- push_conflict
- preserved_needs_review
- default failure
bead.acceptance: 1. cli/internal/agent/testdata/refactor_baseline/ exists with one .jsonl file per lifecycle scenario above. 2. Each fixture captures full bead.result + execute-bead + review + routing + triage-decision + loop-error event sequences. 3. Diff helper TestRefactorBaseline_FixturesStable in a new test file confirms each fixture is byte-identical to the recorded baseline. 4. cd cli && go test -run TestRefactorBaseline ./internal/agent/ green. 5. Documented in /tmp/execute-bead-refactor-proposal.md §6.1 R4 cross-reference.
